interpretation.why_not_complete: This fine-grained matrix confirms the goal.md requirements are explicitly mapped, but many requirements remain partial, blocked, or out_of_scope due to live Kit, ROS/hardware, official Level C artifact, trained checkpoint, Fig.5/Fig.6, and full training/evaluation gaps.

rows.requirement: Use fixed ROOT/DOWNLOAD_ROOT and keep generated artifacts under the project root.
rows.verification: Master/completion evidence uses /mnt/infini-data/test/BeyondMimic paths.

rows.requirement: Do not connect to or claim Unitree G1 hardware reproduction without hardware/safety setup.
rows.verification: Real robot gate is out_of_scope; no real launch is executed.

rows.requirement: Recursively inventory download contents before further downloads.
rows.verification: Local inventory and source ledger exist.

rows.requirement: Keep raw download area read-only and use work copies/patches/wrappers.
rows.verification: Official work copies live under reproduction/third_party/official.

rows.requirement: Respect evidence priority and record paper/code conflicts.
rows.verification: Adaptive-sampling paper/code look-back discrepancy is machine-audited.

rows.requirement: Run and save system/GPU/disk audit.
rows.verification: System audit log exists.

rows.remaining_gap: Full IsaacLab/Kit and training smoke gates remain blocked/incomplete.
rows.requirement: Create project-local envs and export environment locks.
rows.verification: bm_analysis, bm_tracking, bm_diffusion, Isaac Sim locks, smoke evidence, and unified resolved config manifest exist.

rows.remaining_gap: Full IsaacLab/Kit smoke is blocked by inotify limits.
rows.requirement: Pass smoke tests before full training.
rows.verification: Analysis, PyTorch, Isaac import, non-Kit tracking smokes, and preserved failed Kit smoke evidence exist.

rows.remaining_gap: No full training run proves sustained 18-22 GiB utilization, 90% GPU-Util, or throughput metrics.
rows.requirement: Use GPUs responsibly, avoid fake utilization, monitor long runs.
rows.verification: System/GPU inventory plus goal-schema gpu_metrics.csv snapshot exist; audit records no artificial load or power/clock changes.

rows.requirement: Create and maintain required project structure.
rows.verification: Required source/config/result directory skeleton exists.

rows.requirement: Reproduce released-data figures with processed CSV and PDF/SVG/PNG outputs.
rows.verification: Released-data panel mapping passes and 13 figure groups are summarized.

rows.remaining_gap: Live Kit execution and ROS 2 Jazzy/Noble sim-to-sim remain blocked.
rows.requirement: Run official-code motion preprocessing, replay, PPO tracking, evaluation, ONNX export, and sim-to-sim.
rows.verification: Static/source contracts are audited.

rows.requirement: If official VAE/diffusion code is absent, mark reimplementation boundaries and avoid hidden proxies.
rows.verification: Official artifact audit found no official BeyondMimic VAE/diffusion code/checkpoint/engine.

rows.requirement: Do not fake metrics, overclaim proxies, delete failures, or tune to paper numbers.
rows.verification: Final/unresolved reports keep debug-only, blocked, and not-reproduced boundaries explicit.

rows.requirement: Audit motion tracking frequency, networks, PPO, targets, rewards, observations, action, randomization, termination, adaptive sampling.
rows.verification: Paper/code table values and adaptive-sampling discrepancy are audited.

rows.remaining_gap: True DAgger rollout, trained checkpoint, and closed-loop VAE evaluation are missing.
rows.requirement: Implement conditional VAE and true DAgger rollout/teacher query.
rows.verification: VAE architecture/loss/latent/debug accumulation are audited.

rows.remaining_gap: No trained VAE rollout latents or live accept/reject decisions.
rows.requirement: Build state-latent trajectory dataset with OU perturbation, rejection, symmetry, provenance, and split.
rows.verification: Debug fixtures/manifests cover schema, OU, 2.5s/5s windows, and split leakage checks.

rows.remaining_gap: No paper trainable rollout dataset/checkpoint uses this end-to-end.
rows.requirement: Implement hybrid yaw-centric state representation, emphasis projection c=6, and pseudoinverse inverse transform.
rows.verification: Formula-level representation, emphasis, and inverse-transform audits pass on debug artifacts.

rows.remaining_gap: No full diffusion training, checkpoint, or paper rollout evaluation.
rows.requirement: Implement/train Transformer denoiser with paper architecture, clean target, independent timesteps, EMA, and 25 Hz controller.
rows.verification: Paper-sized forward/backward, parameter-count, schedule, and timestep/mask probes exist.

rows.remaining_gap: No trained closed-loop task videos/metrics or validation/test scene protocol.
rows.requirement: Implement joystick, waypoint, SDF, inpainting, composed guidance, weight sweeps, and metrics.
rows.verification: Guidance task coverage audit maps all 30 Phase 8 task/requirement rows; paper-explicit formulas and debug reverse-loop/scale sweep are audited.

rows.remaining_gap: No new trained ablation runs for tracking/diffusion.
rows.requirement: Run motion-tracking and diffusion ablations one variable at a time.
rows.verification: Ablation coverage audit maps all 15 Phase 9 items; released-data ablation panels are reproduced; comparison marks unavailable diffusion ablation metrics.

rows.remaining_gap: Paper-level tracking/VAE/diffusion multi-seed rollout metrics, trained checkpoints, and live evaluation logs are missing or blocked.
rows.requirement: Report tracking, adaptive sampling, VAE, diffusion/guidance, and statistics metrics.
rows.verification: All 44 Section 12 metrics are mapped; released/debug/formula-API evidence is consolidated, including success/fall/velocity metric contracts and the Results-claim links for 12.14%/13.65% velocity error and 5%/95% cartwheel success.

rows.requirement: Create comparison CSV/MD with exact comparison type vocabulary and checkpoint paper values.
rows.verification: Comparison rows are valid and required goal checkpoints are present.

rows.remaining_gap: No full package implementation/test suite for all final training/deployment code exists.
rows.requirement: Use typed scripts/docstrings and test core math operations.
rows.verification: Core math now has reusable package modules, a package API audit, a coding-requirements audit, direct unit tests, audit/probe scripts, and py_compile checks.

rows.remaining_gap: No completed full training run directories with real checkpoints/videos.
rows.requirement: Use run IDs/statuses and save configs/logs/metrics/checkpoints/videos per run.
rows.verification: A goal-schema diagnostic run directory and a preserved failed Kit/inotify run record exist.

rows.remaining_gap: Required-artifact audit records missing checkpoints, ONNX/TensorRT, videos, rollout logs, trained code outputs, and hardware/training costs.
rows.requirement: Deliver envs, code, experiments, docs, final report, rerun instructions, and boundaries.
rows.verification: Final report exists in both the legacy docs path and the goal.md-specified res/final_report/reproduction_report.md path; top-level README, runbook, experiment protocol, resolved config, artifact hash manifest, failed-run retention evidence, and required-artifact absence audit also exist.

rows.requirement: Maintain detailed PROGRESS.md.
rows.verification: Progress file is updated with commands, outputs, metrics, risks, and counts.

rows.requirement: Start with audit/environment, then continue released figures, tracking, VAE, diffusion, guidance, ablations, comparison, final report.
rows.verification: Audit/environment/released-data/comparison/final evidence exists.

scope: fine-grained goal.md requirement matrix tied to current evidence and remaining gaps
